Who We Are

Built on 25 years
of winning.

At High Performance Athletics, our mission is to enhance each athlete's natural ability to reach their maximum potential. Research-based best practices, customized and tailored to individual goals.

Our nationally recognized coaches hold a collective 95 years of championship-level experience at the professional, collegiate, and high school levels. From beginners to professional athletes, we have the knowledge, experience, and equipment.

25+ Years Active
95+ Coaching Years Combined
4+ Locations Nationwide
What We Offer

Train like a champion.

01
Speed and Agility

Sport-specific speed training engineered to maximize explosive power, reaction time, and field agility through biomechanics-based programming.

Book Now
02
Sports Assessments

Data-driven performance assessments tailored to your sport. We identify gaps and build personalized development roadmaps from the ground up.

Book Now
03
Fitness Training

Holistic fitness programs built beyond athletic performance. Strength, endurance, and functional movement that lasts a lifetime.

Book Now
04
Group Training

High-energy group sessions that build team chemistry, accountability, and elite-level performance across all ages and skill levels.

Book Now
05
Periodization Plans

Science-backed training cycles that peak your performance at the right time. From pre-season prep to championship-day readiness.

Book Now
06
Coaches Corner

Immersive coaching seminars for coaches ready to transform their entire programs with championship-proven methodology.

Learn More
HPA On Campus

Our staff
travels
to you.

We bring our comprehensive, best-practice sport-specific training program directly to high schools, colleges, and private clubs across the nation. Five days of intensive training over a seven-day period, two hours per session, designed to maximize athletic development.

Request a Campus Visit
